title: Tender Spicy French Trout Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving french dish featuring tender trout stir-fried with a spicy kick and seasoned with aromatic herbs to satisfy your plant-based cravings.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce (or tamari for vegan option)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and red pepper flakes; stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Toss in garlic and shallots, then add trout fillets skin-side down. Season with soy sauce (or tamari) and thyme.
Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking on all sides. Cook until the trout is just cooked through (around 5-7 minutes per side), adjusting seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped fresh coriander before serving.
